[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: A small indoor room is shown with a bed covered by a pink cloth and many chibi-style anime figures arranged around it.

Setting:
The scene is inside a room with tiled flooring, beige walls, and a white ceiling with a central hanging light fixture. The walls include vertical striped wallpaper on the left side and two windows on the right side, one with a curtain. The lighting is warm and comes from the ceiling light.

Main Subject:
The main focus is a bed in the center-left of the image with a pink tablecloth-like covering, where multiple small chibi-style anime figures are posed around a tabletop area, along with small scattered items and playing cards or small cards.

Visual Details:
A rectangular bed occupies most of the left and center foreground, with brown bedding edges visible under the pink cloth. A black cat sits near the left side of the bed on the pink covering. Around the center of the bed, there are small anime figurines with large eyes and varied pastel and dark outfits, including characters with light hair, dark hair, green hair, purple hair, and blond hair, posed sitting, standing, or leaning forward. Some figures appear to hold small objects, including one near the center holding a card-like item. Several small items are scattered on the cloth, including small rectangular pieces that look like cards and small decorative objects with rounded shapes. On the right side of the bed, a red pillow sits against the wall, and a small bookcase or shelving unit stands to the right of the bed with stacked books and items on the shelves. The window on the right has a partially drawn curtain in a brownish tone. The camera angle is slightly elevated and tilted, giving a clear view across the bed toward the right wall.

Visible Text:
No important visible text detected.

Practical Summary:
The image shows a cozy indoor room with a bed covered in pink cloth where many small chibi-style anime figures are arranged. A ceiling light and warm interior lighting illuminate the bed area, pillows, scattered small objects, and nearby bookshelves and windows.
- Hasil Ekstraksi Teks Gambar (OCR):

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.
